ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation run */,
  "sim_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation run */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation run */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the simulation was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the simulation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the simulation (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the simulation started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the simulation ended */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the simulation */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Information about the simulation environment (e.g., hardware, software versions) */,
  "iteration" INTEGER /* Number of iterations for the simulation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cache_levels" (
  "cache_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cache configuration */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the cache configuration belongs to */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of the cache (e.g., L1, L2) */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the cache in bytes */,
  "associativity" INTEGER /* Associativity of the cache */,
  "line_size" INTEGER /* Line size of the cache in bytes */,
  "replacement_policy" TEXT /* Type of replacement policy used (e.g., LRU, FIFO) */,
  "block_size" INTEGER /* Size of each block in the cache */,
  "write_policy" TEXT /* Write policy (e.g., write-through, write-back) */,
  "read_latency" REAL /* Latency for read operations */,
  "write_latency" REAL /* Latency for write operations */,
  "is_inclusive" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the cache is inclusive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cache_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cache_levels_level FOREIGN KEY ("level") REFERENCES cache_level_types ("level_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cache_levels_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation result */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation run */,
  "hit_rate" REAL /* Hit rate of the cache */,
  "miss_rate" REAL /* Miss rate of the cache */,
  "throughput" REAL /* Throughput of the cache */,
  "latency" REAL /* Latency of the cache */,
  "if_error" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if an error occurred */,
  "output" TEXT /* Output of the simulation run */,
  "energy_consumption" REAL /* Energy consumption during the simulation */,
  "power_consumption" REAL /* Power consumption during the simulation */,
  "error_details" TEXT /* Detailed error information if an error occurred */,
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to a table for storing comparison results */,
  "report_url" TEXT /* URL to a detailed report of the simulation results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_miss_rate FOREIGN KEY ("miss_rate") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_hit_rate FOREIGN KEY ("hit_rate") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_throughput FOREIGN KEY ("throughput") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_latency FOREIGN KEY ("latency") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation being audited */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Previous value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag (e.g., performance, optimization) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_tags_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cache_level_types" (
  "level_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cache level type */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the cache level (e.g., L1, L2) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cache level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., hit_rate, miss_rate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)
